item.title: Cardschatter: NFL Injury News reposteó Darren Urban @Cardschatter · 18min This was expected. Question is when the extension might be d
item.description: NFL Injury News reposteó Darren Urban @Cardschatter · 18min This was expected. Question is when the extension might be done. Cita Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 19min The #AZCardinals have picked up the fifth-year option on LT Paris Johnson Jr., source says. That’s just over $19 million for the 2027 season for the 2023 sixth-overall pick with more surely coming eventually via a new deal at some point. 4 22 2 mil
